creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Chris, this implies, the port may be unsafe for parallelization.

Can you investigate, why MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes is necessary in your case? Is your machine simply too resource-constrained to handle multiple optimizing compilations?

Also, how long did you wait for the nasm to finish, before declaring it "hung"? And what state was it in, when seemingly hanging? Was it, for example, reading (or writing out) paging file (swapping)?
